beats.sup0: second person; you are {HERO} who has slipped below the stage into {THRESHOLD} to reach the {GOAL}; the way out is one long spine of mirror rooms, each a killing test; state the grave stakes plainly, many go down and few come up, and a wrong step ends here
beats.sup1: second person; {ENTRANCE} seals cold behind you and the way is one long spine of mirror rooms falling deeper under the stage; there is no going back and no second try inside, only forward from room to room, and each room is a test that has kept better climbers than you; keep your nerve and your eyes
beats.st01_ap0: second person; you come to {ST01_ROOM}; you enter a round hall of a hundred bright doorways, all of them mirrors; the cold air smells of dust and old velvet from the theatre above
beats.st01_gate: second person; every doorway throws your reflection back at you except one; the true door is the black gap that holds no reflection; the rule is plain, walk into any mirror and the glass takes your face; choose the door that does not answer you
beats.st01_pass: second person; the false doors fall dark behind you and a narrow passage of cold glass opens; you are past the first hall
beats.st01_f0_c0: second person; you strike the lit glass at a run and it does not give
beats.st01_f0_c1: second person; the mirror splits along your reflection and the shards come inward before you can turn
beats.st01_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the mirror splits along your reflection and the shards come inward before you can turn
beats.st01_f1_c0: second person; you stand still and watch the hundred reflections instead of moving
beats.st01_f1_c1: second person; the delay is the death here; the ushers who keep this hall close on your held silhouette in the glass
beats.st01_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death here; the ushers who keep this hall close on your held silhouette in the glass
beats.st01_f2_c0: second person; you run your palm across the silvered seams looking for iron
beats.st01_f2_c1: second person; a frame swings and the edge opens your hand to the wrist, and the cold does the rest
beats.st01_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a frame swings and the edge opens your hand to the wrist, and the cold does the rest
beats.st01_f3_c0: second person; you trust the figure that walks where you walk and go after it
beats.st01_f3_c1: second person; it leads you between two mirrors that were never a door and the hall folds shut
beats.st01_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it leads you between two mirrors that were never a door and the hall folds shut
beats.st01_seen: second person; you turn back toward the doorway you entered by; it may still be open, or the hall may have sealed it in silvered glass behind you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st01_fd_c0: second person; you press into where you came from and meet cold glass
beats.st01_fd_c1: second person; your own eyes stare back an instant before the hall keeps you
beats.st01_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; your own eyes stare back an instant before the hall keeps you
beats.st01_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; hands in {ST01_GUARD}'s gloves take your arms from the dark and walk you up into a locked box above; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st02_ap0: second person; you come to {ST02_ROOM}; a staircase drops away, reflected on both walls into a falling infinity of steps; a single candle burns at the bottom
beats.st02_gate: second person; the candlelight catches every solid step and slides off the false ones; a step that shines back at you is glass and will drop you the whole depth of the stair; tread only the steps the candle does not light
beats.st02_pass: second person; you go down step by dull step and reach the burning candle at the foot; the stair is behind you
beats.st02_f0_c0: second person; you set your weight on a step that shines back at you
beats.st02_f0_c1: second person; the glass gives like water and the reflected stair swallows you down its false depth
beats.st02_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the glass gives like water and the reflected stair swallows you down its false depth
beats.st02_f1_c0: second person; you throw a leg over the rail and let the smooth glass carry you
beats.st02_f1_c1: second person; the banister ends in mirror halfway down and there is nothing under your hands but the drop
beats.st02_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the banister ends in mirror halfway down and there is nothing under your hands but the drop
beats.st02_f2_c0: second person; you freeze on the landing and wait for the false steps to sort themselves out
beats.st02_f2_c1: second person; waiting is the killing here; the candle gutters, the solid steps go dark with the false, and the stair takes the guess you finally make
beats.st02_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting is the killing here; the candle gutters, the solid steps go dark with the false, and the stair takes the guess you finally make
beats.st02_f3_c0: second person; you leap for the light at the bottom in one drop
beats.st02_f3_c1: second person; the candle stood on glass; you and the flame go through it together
beats.st02_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the candle stood on glass; you and the flame go through it together
beats.st02_seen: second person; you crush the flame; in the sudden black the solid steps might glow faintly of themselves, or the whole stair might vanish under you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st02_fd_c0: second person; you take a step you cannot see
beats.st02_fd_c1: second person; the reflected stair opens and there is no landing
beats.st02_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the reflected stair opens and there is no landing
beats.st02_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST02_GUARD}'s lantern finds you frozen on the last true step and its owner does not mean to let you leave; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st03_ap0: second person; you come to {ST03_ROOM}; a long mirrored gallery curves away; far above, an orchestra tunes for the evening and the sound leaks down through the stone
beats.st03_gate: second person; the glass here is strung so tight that any near sound cracks it; you may only move under the loud swells of the orchestra above, never in the quiet between them; step in a silence and the walls shatter on you
beats.st03_pass: second person; you time your steps to the music and cross under cover of a long chord; the gallery holds
beats.st03_f0_c0: second person; you choose a still moment and walk it in silence
beats.st03_f0_c1: second person; your own footfall is the loudest thing in the hush and the strung glass answers it all at once
beats.st03_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your own footfall is the loudest thing in the hush and the strung glass answers it all at once
beats.st03_f1_c0: second person; you raise your voice to map the gallery ahead
beats.st03_f1_c1: second person; the word returns as a hundred cracks and the ceiling of mirror lets go
beats.st03_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the word returns as a hundred cracks and the ceiling of mirror lets go
beats.st03_f2_c0: second person; you crouch and hold until the players rest
beats.st03_f2_c1: second person; the wait is the trap; in the rest between pieces there is no cover left, and the first step you take rings the whole gallery down
beats.st03_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait is the trap; in the rest between pieces there is no cover left, and the first step you take rings the whole gallery down
beats.st03_f3_c0: second person; you keep a palm on the cold glass as you go
beats.st03_f3_c1: second person; the friction sings up the pane and the note it finds is the one that breaks
beats.st03_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the friction sings up the pane and the note it finds is the one that breaks
beats.st03_f4_c0: second person; you pitch your own voice into the music to stay hidden
beats.st03_f4_c1: second person; you land a half-tone off and the discord splits the gallery from end to end
beats.st03_f4_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; you land a half-tone off and the discord splits the gallery from end to end
beats.st03_seen: second person; you break into a dead run for the far arch; you may cross before the glass can gather the sound, or you may not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st03_fd_c0: second person; the glass gathers the sound of them
beats.st03_fd_c1: second person; the gallery comes down a stride from the arch
beats.st03_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the gallery comes down a stride from the arch
beats.st03_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST03_GUARD} hauls you through a side door as the glass falls, and the door locks from his side; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st04_ap0: second person; you come to {ST04_ROOM}; the passage opens under a vast chandelier of glass drops, hung on one frayed chain over a floor of mirror
beats.st04_gate: second person; the chandelier swings a slow arc; cross only when it hangs dead still at the top of its swing, never while it moves; step under it swinging and it comes down through you and the floor both
beats.st04_pass: second person; you wait out the swing, then walk the floor beneath the stopped weight and reach the far door
beats.st04_f0_c0: second person; you break for the far side as the great weight rises
beats.st04_f0_c1: second person; the arc reverses at the top and the chandelier finds the floor, and you, on the way down
beats.st04_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the arc reverses at the top and the chandelier finds the floor, and you, on the way down
beats.st04_f1_c0: second person; you swing at the frayed chain to be rid of the thing
beats.st04_f1_c1: second person; it drops early and wide and the glass storm of it fills the vault
beats.st04_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it drops early and wide and the glass storm of it fills the vault
beats.st04_f2_c0: second person; you wait for the swing to die of itself before moving
beats.st04_f2_c1: second person; waiting kills you here; the draft from the passage keeps it swinging, and the longer you crouch the more the guards behind you gain
beats.st04_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting kills you here; the draft from the passage keeps it swinging, and the longer you crouch the more the guards behind you gain
beats.st04_f3_c0: second person; you take to the chain to pass over the top
beats.st04_f3_c1: second person; the frayed link parts under your weight and takes you into the drops below
beats.st04_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frayed link parts under your weight and takes you into the drops below
beats.st04_seen: second person; you decide the floor is solid enough and start across without minding the swing; the mirror underfoot may be stone-backed, or only glass over the drop; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st04_fd_c0: second person; it stars white under your second step
beats.st04_fd_c1: second person; you go through it under the swinging weight
beats.st04_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; you go through it under the swinging weight
beats.st04_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; a rope drops from the dark above and {ST04_GUARD}'s hands haul you up out of the vault and do not set you free; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st05_ap0: second person; you come to {ST05_ROOM}; a single tall mirror blocks the passage, rimed white with frost, the only way a door somewhere in its face
beats.st05_gate: second person; breathe on the frost and your breath clears the true seam of the door; but the cold of this glass is deep, and every breath you spend leaning close leaks the warmth out of you; find the seam in one breath and go, linger and the cold stops your heart
beats.st05_pass: second person; your breath clears the door's outline; you find the seam and push through before the cold can hold you
beats.st05_f0_c0: second person; you press your palms flat to melt a wider view
beats.st05_f0_c1: second person; the cold climbs your arms faster than the frost clears and it does not let go
beats.st05_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the cold climbs your arms faster than the frost clears and it does not let go
beats.st05_f1_c0: second person; you lean close and fog it again and again to read it perfectly
beats.st05_f1_c1: second person; the waiting is the wound; each careful breath spends more of your warmth than the last, and the cold takes you leaning on the glass
beats.st05_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the wound; each careful breath spends more of your warmth than the last, and the cold takes you leaning on the glass
beats.st05_f2_c0: second person; you drive your elbow into the rimed pane
beats.st05_f2_c1: second person; the frost-brittle mirror bursts and the cold rushes the whole gap into you
beats.st05_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frost-brittle mirror bursts and the cold rushes the whole gap into you
beats.st05_f3_c0: second person; you scrub at the ice to see the door plain
beats.st05_f3_c1: second person; the frost peels and the bare cold glass drinks the heat straight out of your hand and up
beats.st05_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the frost peels and the bare cold glass drinks the heat straight out of your hand and up
beats.st05_seen: second person; you do not fog it at all; you press where you think the door must be and trust the guess; the frost hides a seam or a solid pane; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st05_fd_c0: second person; the solid glass holds and the cold holds you
beats.st05_fd_c1: second person; you freeze against the mirror with your hand still raised
beats.st05_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; you freeze against the mirror with your hand still raised
beats.st05_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST05_GUARD} wrapped against the cold lifts you off the frost half-frozen and carries you somewhere with a lock; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st06_ap0: second person; you come to {ST06_ROOM}; two figures stand in the passage ahead, identical, one of glass and one of flesh, and only one will let you pass
beats.st06_gate: second person; a real body casts a shadow on the floor and a reflection does not; {ST06_GUARD} guards the false path and the glass one stands before the true door; pass the figure that throws no shadow, and never the one that does
beats.st06_pass: second person; you walk past the shadowless figure and it does not move; the true door stands open behind it
beats.st06_f0_c0: second person; you step by the figure the light lies across
beats.st06_f0_c1: second person; the flesh warden closes a hand on you and the glass door was never his to open
beats.st06_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the flesh warden closes a hand on you and the glass door was never his to open
beats.st06_f1_c0: second person; you swing to shatter the figure you take for a mirror
beats.st06_f1_c1: second person; your fist meets flesh, not glass, and he was faster than you guessed
beats.st06_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your fist meets flesh, not glass, and he was faster than you guessed
beats.st06_f2_c0: second person; you hold and watch the two figures for the rise of a chest
beats.st06_f2_c1: second person; the delay is fatal; neither breathes for you, and the flesh one tires of the game and takes you where you stand
beats.st06_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is fatal; neither breathes for you, and the flesh one tires of the game and takes you where you stand
beats.st06_f3_c0: second person; you try to thread the gap without choosing
beats.st06_f3_c1: second person; both close on you at once, glass on one side and hands on the other, and the gap was never a path
beats.st06_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; both close on you at once, glass on one side and hands on the other, and the gap was never a path
beats.st06_seen: second person; you reach out to the figure on your right; a cold palm is glass and safe, a warm one is {ST06_GUARD} and is not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st06_fd_c0: second person; the warden has you before you can pull back
beats.st06_fd_c1: second person; he does not let a caught hand go
beats.st06_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; he does not let a caught hand go
beats.st06_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST06_GUARD} marches you off down a corridor of mirrors to a door that only opens the one way; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st07_ap0: second person; you come to {ST07_ROOM}; the floor falls into a flooded pit, black water doubling the mirrored walls so pit and reflection meet at a seam
beats.st07_gate: second person; the water is deep and the reflected floor beneath it is a lie; only the narrow stone rim around the edge bears weight; walk the rim, never the bright false floor on the water
beats.st07_pass: second person; you press your back to the glass and side-step the rim all the way around; the pit is behind you
beats.st07_f0_c0: second person; you step out onto the shining floor the water shows
beats.st07_f0_c1: second person; there is no floor, only the double of one, and the black water closes over your head
beats.st07_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; there is no floor, only the double of one, and the black water closes over your head
beats.st07_f1_c0: second person; you lower yourself in to swim the shorter line
beats.st07_f1_c1: second person; the cold pit has no far wall you can climb, only sheer glass, and it keeps what falls in
beats.st07_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the cold pit has no far wall you can climb, only sheer glass, and it keeps what falls in
beats.st07_f2_c0: second person; you crouch on the stone and wait for the surface to settle
beats.st07_f2_c1: second person; the wait drowns you slow; the water is rising from somewhere, and it takes the rim out from under you inch by inch
beats.st07_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait drowns you slow; the water is rising from somewhere, and it takes the rim out from under you inch by inch
beats.st07_f3_c0: second person; you grab the handrail the mirror shows over the water
beats.st07_f3_c1: second person; your hand closes on nothing and the reach pitches you off the true rim
beats.st07_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your hand closes on nothing and the reach pitches you off the true rim
beats.st07_seen: second person; you back up and run for the narrowest span of black water; you may clear it, or you may come down short in the dark; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st07_fd_c0: second person; the water takes your legs and then the rest
beats.st07_fd_c1: second person; the pit does not give back what it catches
beats.st07_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the pit does not give back what it catches
beats.st07_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST07_GUARD} poles out of the dark, hauls you dripping from the pit, and rows you to a cell above the waterline; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st08_ap0: second person; you come to {ST08_ROOM}; a low maze of glass walls runs ahead, some turns lit by candles set in the mirrors, some dark
beats.st08_gate: second person; the candles here mark the mirror dead-ends, set to draw you into the glass; the true way is always the unlit turn; follow the dark corridors, never the lit ones
beats.st08_pass: second person; you keep to the dark corners against every pull of the candlelight and come out the far side of the maze
beats.st08_f0_c0: second person; you go toward the warm candlelight at the next corner
beats.st08_f0_c1: second person; the lit turn ends in a mirror and you are already at a run when you meet it
beats.st08_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the lit turn ends in a mirror and you are already at a run when you meet it
beats.st08_f1_c0: second person; you snuff a flame to make a dead-end look like a way
beats.st08_f1_c1: second person; the melted wax scalds your hand and you reel into the very glass you meant to hide
beats.st08_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the melted wax scalds your hand and you reel into the very glass you meant to hide
beats.st08_f2_c0: second person; you sit at a junction and wait for the lights to die on their own
beats.st08_f2_c1: second person; waiting is the killing; the candles are trimmed by unseen hands and never burn down, and the ones that keep the maze find you sitting
beats.st08_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; waiting is the killing; the candles are trimmed by unseen hands and never burn down, and the ones that keep the maze find you sitting
beats.st08_f3_c0: second person; you rap the panes for the ring of an open way
beats.st08_f3_c1: second person; one pane you strike is under tension and it bursts across you at the sound
beats.st08_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; one pane you strike is under tension and it bursts across you at the sound
beats.st08_seen: second person; you wet a finger and follow the faint cold draft, hoping the true way breathes air; the moving air may lead out or into a vent of glass; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st08_fd_c0: second person; you are boxed in mirror with the air whistling past
beats.st08_fd_c1: second person; the maze closes the way you came
beats.st08_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the maze closes the way you came
beats.st08_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST08_GUARD} with a shielded lamp finds you in the dark and leads you not out but up, to a barred room; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st09_ap0: second person; you come to {ST09_ROOM}; a trapdoor sits in the floor beneath the stage, a prompter's box half sunk in mirror, its lid keyed to the music above
beats.st09_gate: second person; the trap opens clean only on the downbeat of the music overhead; force it on a rest and the mechanism scissors shut; drop through on the beat, never in the silence between
beats.st09_pass: second person; you count the bars, take the beat, and drop clean into the passage below the box
beats.st09_f0_c0: second person; you lever the trap in the hush between phrases
beats.st09_f0_c1: second person; the box takes the silence as its cue to close and the lid comes down like shears
beats.st09_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the box takes the silence as its cue to close and the lid comes down like shears
beats.st09_f1_c0: second person; you hold for a pause wide enough to be sure of
beats.st09_f1_c1: second person; the delay is the death; the piece ends and the players go still, and with no beat left the trap seals for the night with you on the wrong side
beats.st09_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the piece ends and the players go still, and with no beat left the trap seals for the night with you on the wrong side
beats.st09_f2_c0: second person; you jam a splinter of mirror into the hinge
beats.st09_f2_c1: second person; the glass wedge snaps and the freed lid falls twice as fast
beats.st09_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the glass wedge snaps and the freed lid falls twice as fast
beats.st09_f3_c0: second person; you take the end of the phrase instead of its downbeat
beats.st09_f3_c1: second person; you misjudge the count and the box closes as you are still half through it
beats.st09_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; you misjudge the count and the box closes as you are still half through it
beats.st09_seen: second person; you throw yourself at the trap and roll for the gap on instinct, no count kept; instinct lands you clear or lands you under the lid; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st09_fd_c0: second person; the lid finds your shoulder as you fall
beats.st09_fd_c1: second person; the box does not open twice
beats.st09_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the box does not open twice
beats.st09_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST09_GUARD} is below, and he closes cold hands on your collar the moment you land in his box; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st10_ap0: second person; you come to {ST10_ROOM}; a wall of mirrored theatre masks hangs down the passage, each a doubled face, one of them an opening
beats.st10_gate: second person; the masks blink in their reflections, all but one; the mask that never blinks is a hole cut to look like the rest, and it is the way through; go to the still, unblinking mask, never a blinking one
beats.st10_pass: second person; you fix on the one dead face among the blinking masks and step into the dark hole behind it
beats.st10_f0_c0: second person; you choose a living, blinking face and press it
beats.st10_f0_c1: second person; the mask is solid mirror and it splits into your own reflected eyes
beats.st10_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the mask is solid mirror and it splits into your own reflected eyes
beats.st10_f1_c0: second person; you take a mask down to find the opening by hand
beats.st10_f1_c1: second person; the wall behind is unbroken glass and the mask's edge lays your palm open
beats.st10_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wall behind is unbroken glass and the mask's edge lays your palm open
beats.st10_f2_c0: second person; you stand and wait for the faces to go still
beats.st10_f2_c1: second person; the waiting kills; the masks blink on and on and the one you needed is lost among them while the gallery's keeper closes in
beats.st10_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting kills; the masks blink on and on and the one you needed is lost among them while the gallery's keeper closes in
beats.st10_f3_c0: second person; you shut your eyes and grope the wall of faces
beats.st10_f3_c1: second person; blind, you press a blinking mask for the still one and the glass takes the guess
beats.st10_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; blind, you press a blinking mask for the still one and the glass takes the guess
beats.st10_f4_c0: second person; you strike the unblinking face to be sure of the way
beats.st10_f4_c1: second person; it was already an opening; the blow drives your arm through into edges you could not see
beats.st10_f4_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it was already an opening; the blow drives your arm through into edges you could not see
beats.st10_seen: second person; you try to hold every mask at once and catch which never blinks; your eye may find the still face, or lose it in the flutter; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st10_fd_c0: second person; you reach for a face that blinked a beat ago
beats.st10_fd_c1: second person; the mirror mask closes on your reaching hand
beats.st10_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the mirror mask closes on your reaching hand
beats.st10_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST10_GUARD} steps from the wall, takes your arm, and fits you a room with no door of your own; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st11_ap0: second person; you come to {ST11_ROOM}; a square room of mirror floors down which fine sand pours from the seams, the tiles going under grain by grain
beats.st11_gate: second person; the floor drains into itself and the tiles vanish under the rising sand as you watch; cross before the sand hides the true tiles, and never trust a tile the sand has already buried, for you cannot see the drop beneath it
beats.st11_pass: second person; you go quick over the bare tiles while you can still read them and reach the door before the sand wins
beats.st11_f0_c0: second person; you push into the drifted sand where the floor is hidden
beats.st11_f0_c1: second person; under the sand a tile is gone and you find the drop with your whole weight
beats.st11_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; under the sand a tile is gone and you find the drop with your whole weight
beats.st11_f1_c0: second person; you hold at the door for the room to empty and clear
beats.st11_f1_c1: second person; the wait is the killing; the sand never stops pouring, it only rises, and it closes over the last true tile with you still deciding
beats.st11_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the wait is the killing; the sand never stops pouring, it only rises, and it closes over the last true tile with you still deciding
beats.st11_f2_c0: second person; you crouch to brush a path clear with your hands
beats.st11_f2_c1: second person; the sand pours faster than you can sweep and it buries your knees, then the rest
beats.st11_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the sand pours faster than you can sweep and it buries your knees, then the rest
beats.st11_f3_c0: second person; you jump the shortest line straight across
beats.st11_f3_c1: second person; a tile you land on was already hollow under its dusting of sand and it drops out from you
beats.st11_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a tile you land on was already hollow under its dusting of sand and it drops out from you
beats.st11_seen: second person; you commit and sprint the sanded floor without reading it, betting most tiles still hold; speed may carry you over the gaps or into one; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st11_fd_c0: second person; the sand pours in after you
beats.st11_fd_c1: second person; the chamber fills above where you fell
beats.st11_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the chamber fills above where you fell
beats.st11_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST11_GUARD} digs you out of the sand at the low end and the digging ends at a barred door; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st12_ap0: second person; you come to {ST12_ROOM}; a bridge of clear glass arches over a black drop, its span so clean it seems there is nothing there at all
beats.st12_gate: second person; only the welded seam down the centre of the bridge bears weight; the clear span to either side of the seam is a single pane that will not hold you; walk the seam, never the span
beats.st12_pass: second person; you set each foot on the frosted seam and cross the drop with the black air clear beneath you
beats.st12_f0_c0: second person; you step off the seam onto the clear pane to widen your footing
beats.st12_f0_c1: second person; the single sheet of glass gives all at once and the drop takes you without a sound
beats.st12_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the single sheet of glass gives all at once and the drop takes you without a sound
beats.st12_f1_c0: second person; you go down on hands and knees over the whole width
beats.st12_f1_c1: second person; your knee comes down on the thin span beside the seam and it is gone before you feel it break
beats.st12_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your knee comes down on the thin span beside the seam and it is gone before you feel it break
beats.st12_f2_c0: second person; you hold at the edge for the cold to roughen the surface
beats.st12_f2_c1: second person; the delay is the fall; the span is warming, not frosting, from the lamps below, and the seam you need is fogging out of sight while you wait
beats.st12_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the fall; the span is warming, not frosting, from the lamps below, and the seam you need is fogging out of sight while you wait
beats.st12_f3_c0: second person; you lie flat and push off to skate the bridge
beats.st12_f3_c1: second person; your shoulders spread over both spans at once and the panes let go together
beats.st12_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your shoulders spread over both spans at once and the panes let go together
beats.st12_seen: second person; you decide the whole bridge must be sound and stride it plainly, trusting the glass; the span may be tempered to hold or not; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st12_fd_c0: second person; it stars under your second stride and drops
beats.st12_fd_c1: second person; the black takes you between the arch's ends
beats.st12_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the black takes you between the arch's ends
beats.st12_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST12_GUARD} waits at the far abutment, and he lets you finish the bridge only to take you in hand at the end of it; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st13_ap0: second person; you come to {ST13_ROOM}; the mirrors down this hall murmur, and among the murmur you hear your own name spoken in your own voice
beats.st13_gate: second person; the glass calls you to make you answer and turn, for the face that turns to the mirror is the face the glass keeps; hold your name unanswered and walk straight, never turn to a voice that says it
beats.st13_pass: second person; you fix your eyes on the far arch and let your name fall unanswered behind you; the hall lets you by
beats.st13_f0_c0: second person; you hear yourself called too clearly and you turn to it
beats.st13_f0_c1: second person; your reflection meets your eyes and the glass keeps the face that looked, and you fall still against the pane
beats.st13_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reflection meets your eyes and the glass keeps the face that looked, and you fall still against the pane
beats.st13_f1_c0: second person; you call back at the mirror to break its hold
beats.st13_f1_c1: second person; your voice joins the murmur and becomes another name the hall will use on the next to come; the glass takes you mid-word
beats.st13_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your voice joins the murmur and becomes another name the hall will use on the next to come; the glass takes you mid-word
beats.st13_f2_c0: second person; you halt and wait out the calling, hands over your ears
beats.st13_f2_c1: second person; the waiting is the death; the voices do not tire, they gather, and standing still is the same as turning, so the glass takes you where you stopped
beats.st13_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the death; the voices do not tire, they gather, and standing still is the same as turning, so the glass takes you where you stopped
beats.st13_f3_c0: second person; you go toward the gentlest of the voices calling you
beats.st13_f3_c1: second person; the kind voice leads you face-first to a waiting mirror and it was the kindest lie in the hall
beats.st13_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the kind voice leads you face-first to a waiting mirror and it was the kindest lie in the hall
beats.st13_seen: second person; you listen for the single voice that comes without an echo, betting a true sound has no double here; the flat voice may be a door or a deeper trap; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st13_fd_c0: second person; you turn to it and meet the glass
beats.st13_fd_c1: second person; the hall keeps the face that trusted it
beats.st13_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the hall keeps the face that trusted it
beats.st13_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; the voice was {ST13_GUARD}'s, and {ST13_GUARD} steps out to take the arm of the one who answered and lead you away; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st14_ap0: second person; you come to {ST14_ROOM}; a broken arch of mirror frames the way, half its panes already smashed to a floor of shards, half still whole
beats.st14_gate: second person; here the safe ground is where the glass is already broken, for the shards cannot fall on you twice; the whole panes overhead are hung and waiting; cross under the broken frame, never under a pane still whole
beats.st14_pass: second person; you pick over the fallen shards, keeping under the empty frames, and reach the far side of the arch
beats.st14_f0_c0: second person; you take the clean footing beneath the unbroken mirrors
beats.st14_f0_c1: second person; a whole pane lets go from the arch above and comes down on the clean floor, and you
beats.st14_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; a whole pane lets go from the arch above and comes down on the clean floor, and you
beats.st14_f1_c0: second person; you kick and sweep the broken glass aside for smoother ground
beats.st14_f1_c1: second person; the noise of it shakes a hung pane loose overhead and it falls before you can look up
beats.st14_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the noise of it shakes a hung pane loose overhead and it falls before you can look up
beats.st14_f2_c0: second person; you hold back for the arch to finish shedding its glass
beats.st14_f2_c1: second person; the delay is the death; the panes are pinned, not loose, and they fall only when a warden pulls the pin, timed for whoever waits beneath
beats.st14_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the panes are pinned, not loose, and they fall only when a warden pulls the pin, timed for whoever waits beneath
beats.st14_f3_c0: second person; you sprint the arch to beat the drop
beats.st14_f3_c1: second person; your speed carries you under a whole pane at the worst instant and it meets you there
beats.st14_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your speed carries you under a whole pane at the worst instant and it meets you there
beats.st14_seen: second person; you strip your shoes to cross the shards in silence, betting quiet keeps the panes hung; the silence may hold them or your cut feet may fail you; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st14_fd_c0: second person; you cannot keep your feet under you
beats.st14_fd_c1: second person; you go down under the whole panes still hanging
beats.st14_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; you go down under the whole panes still hanging
beats.st14_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST14_GUARD} picks his way to you across the glass, wraps your bleeding feet, and locks you somewhere to heal for his own reasons; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st15_ap0: second person; you come to {ST15_ROOM}; a wall of mirror sweats a sheet of water down the whole passage, the way a single dry channel through the wet
beats.st15_gate: second person; where the glass runs wet it is charged and the water carries the shock straight to the bone; only the one dry vein down the wall is safe to touch and follow; keep to the dry channel, never lay a hand on the wet glass
beats.st15_pass: second person; you trace the dry channel with a careful hand and follow it the length of the weeping wall
beats.st15_f0_c0: second person; you set your palm flat against the running sheet
beats.st15_f0_c1: second person; the charge in the water takes your arm and does not let the muscle open your hand again
beats.st15_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the charge in the water takes your arm and does not let the muscle open your hand again
beats.st15_f1_c0: second person; you drag your sleeve down the wet to make more dry path
beats.st15_f1_c1: second person; the soaked cloth carries the shock up your arm the instant it touches the sheet
beats.st15_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the soaked cloth carries the shock up your arm the instant it touches the sheet
beats.st15_f2_c0: second person; you hold at the dry vein for the water to run itself out
beats.st15_f2_c1: second person; the waiting kills; the wall weeps from a cistern that never empties, and the dry vein you trust is narrowing to nothing as you wait
beats.st15_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting kills; the wall weeps from a cistern that never empties, and the dry vein you trust is narrowing to nothing as you wait
beats.st15_f3_c0: second person; you reach across the wet sheet for drier glass beyond
beats.st15_f3_c1: second person; your reaching arm bridges the charged water and it closes the circuit through you
beats.st15_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reaching arm bridges the charged water and it closes the circuit through you
beats.st15_seen: second person; you pick the place the sheet runs thinnest and push through it fast, betting a thin film cannot hold enough charge; thin may be safe or only less slow; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st15_fd_c0: second person; it locks your legs mid-stride against the glass
beats.st15_fd_c1: second person; you go down against the weeping wall
beats.st15_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; you go down against the weeping wall
beats.st15_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST15_GUARD} throws a dry hooked pole and drags you off the charged wall, then keeps the hook on you all the way to a cell; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st16_ap0: second person; you come to {ST16_ROOM}; a drum of mirror turns slowly across the passage, its one doorway swinging past the opening once each revolution
beats.st16_gate: second person; the drum's door lines up with the way out only for a breath on each turn; step through on the half-turn when the openings meet, and never against the closed wall of the drum, which will grind you into the frame
beats.st16_pass: second person; you watch the drum come round, take the door as it meets the frame, and ride the half-turn out the other side
beats.st16_f0_c0: second person; you push into the drum before its door has come round
beats.st16_f0_c1: second person; the turning wall carries you into the frame and there is no give in either
beats.st16_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the turning wall carries you into the frame and there is no give in either
beats.st16_f1_c0: second person; you jam your shoulder to hold the drum still for a clean step
beats.st16_f1_c1: second person; the weight of it does not stop; it pins your arm to the frame and keeps turning
beats.st16_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the weight of it does not stop; it pins your arm to the frame and keeps turning
beats.st16_f2_c0: second person; you hold outside for the turning to ease before you try it
beats.st16_f2_c1: second person; the delay is the death; the drum does not slow, it quickens, and the window of the door shrinks each turn until there is none
beats.st16_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the delay is the death; the drum does not slow, it quickens, and the window of the door shrinks each turn until there is none
beats.st16_f3_c0: second person; you throw yourself at the opening a beat after it lines up
beats.st16_f3_c1: second person; the door swings past and the closing wall catches your trailing leg against the frame
beats.st16_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the door swings past and the closing wall catches your trailing leg against the frame
beats.st16_seen: second person; you slip onto the turning rim and try to walk with the spin to the door, betting you can match its pace; matching carries you round to the gap or slings you off; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st16_fd_c0: second person; the rim throws you into the closing wall
beats.st16_fd_c1: second person; the frame and the wall meet through you
beats.st16_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the frame and the wall meet through you
beats.st16_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST16_GUARD} rides the drum round, catches your wrist on the turn, and rides you back to a room he keeps locked; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st17_ap0: second person; you come to {ST17_ROOM}; a single mirror stands at a low doorway, and in it your own reflection stands squarely between you and the way through
beats.st17_gate: second person; your reflection here moves only while the light burns, and mirrors you move for move so long as it can see you; it cannot follow in the dark; the lamp above will gutter, and in that black breath you must move, for while the light holds, any step you take it takes to block you
beats.st17_pass: second person; the flame ducks and the mirror goes blind for one breath; you move in that black and are past the reflection before the light returns
beats.st17_f0_c0: second person; you move for the doorway in the full light
beats.st17_f0_c1: second person; the reflection steps with you to block the way and you walk your own face into the unyielding glass
beats.st17_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the reflection steps with you to block the way and you walk your own face into the unyielding glass
beats.st17_f1_c0: second person; you put a hand to the glass to push your double away
beats.st17_f1_c1: second person; your reflection's hand meets yours cold and closed and will not let the caught hand back
beats.st17_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; your reflection's hand meets yours cold and closed and will not let the caught hand back
beats.st17_f2_c0: second person; you hold and wait for your double to break and turn
beats.st17_f2_c1: second person; the waiting is the death; it will never look away, for it only ever does what you do, and while you wait the lamp steadies and the keepers come
beats.st17_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the death; it will never look away, for it only ever does what you do, and while you wait the lamp steadies and the keepers come
beats.st17_f3_c0: second person; you throw a false step to draw the reflection wide
beats.st17_f3_c1: second person; it feints exactly with you, for it is you, and closes the true side as you commit to it
beats.st17_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it feints exactly with you, for it is you, and closes the true side as you commit to it
beats.st17_seen: second person; you charge the glass and your double at once, betting speed beats a copy that must wait to see you move; you may burst past before it reads you or drive full into it; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st17_fd_c0: second person; it meets your rush square in the glass
beats.st17_fd_c1: second person; the last mirror keeps the face that ran at it
beats.st17_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the last mirror keeps the face that ran at it
beats.st17_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; as the lamp steadies {ST17_GUARD}'s arms come round you from the true dark, not the glass, and walk you back the way you fought in; the way up is a locked one now
beats.st18_ap0: second person; you come to {ST18_ROOM}; the last hall opens into a sphere of mirror where a thousand of you stand in every direction, and only one direction is a way and not a wall
beats.st18_gate: second person; the true exit is the one bearing where your reflections thin to nothing, for a door reflects no one; every crowded direction is a mirror packed with your doubles; walk toward the gap where the thousand yous fall away, never toward the thickest crowd of them
beats.st18_pass: second person; you find the one bearing empty of yourself and walk into it; the thousand doubles fall away behind you
beats.st18_f0_c0: second person; you go toward where the most of you stand, taking the crowd for company
beats.st18_f0_c1: second person; the crowd is the deepest mirror in the hall and you walk your thousand faces flat into it
beats.st18_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the crowd is the deepest mirror in the hall and you walk your thousand faces flat into it
beats.st18_f1_c0: second person; you stand still to let the thousand doubles quiet and point one way
beats.st18_f1_c1: second person; the waiting is the last trap of the maze; the doubles only multiply the longer you hold, until every bearing is a wall of you and there is no gap left to find
beats.st18_f1_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; the waiting is the last trap of the maze; the doubles only multiply the longer you hold, until every bearing is a wall of you and there is no gap left to find
beats.st18_f2_c0: second person; you strike the reflection standing closest to make a door of it
beats.st18_f2_c1: second person; it was solid mirror and it comes apart into a thousand of your own eyes at once
beats.st18_f2_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it was solid mirror and it comes apart into a thousand of your own eyes at once
beats.st18_f3_c0: second person; you go after the single reflection that seems to wave you forward
beats.st18_f3_c1: second person; it leads you into the crowd, not the gap, for a reflection can only lead you back into the glass
beats.st18_f3_end: second person; the glass keeps you; the labyrinth does not dwell, and no one comes; it leads you into the crowd, not the gap, for a reflection can only lead you back into the glass
beats.st18_seen: second person; you close your eyes on the thousand of you and walk one straight line by feel, betting the gap lies ahead; blind, you may find the open bearing or a wall of yourself; if it holds you are through by a hair and stumbling into the next room with no breath to spare
beats.st18_fd_c0: second person; you open your eyes against a wall of your own faces
beats.st18_fd_c1: second person; the hall keeps the one who could not walk it blind
beats.st18_fd_end: second person; the gamble takes you; the hall keeps the one who could not walk it blind
beats.st18_cap: second person; you are not killed but kept; {ST18_GUARD} steps out of the one true gap, turns you by the shoulder, and walks you off before you reach it yourself; the way up is a locked one now
beats.win_ap: second person; the spine ends at a plain door in a plain wall of glass, and beyond it the empty stage of the opera house stands grey with dawn; {GOAL} are in your coat
beats.win_gate: second person; three ways lead up and out and each is real: {WIN_CLEAN} is the clean way, {WIN_COSTLY} is quicker but it will cut, and {WIN_QUIET} lets you out unseen; the only deaths here are the mirror you smash to be sure, and the wait for the house lights to prove a way that needs no proving
beats.win_clean: second person; {WIN_CLEAN} is an open door; you climb into the empty house as the dawn comes grey through the high windows, the records safe, your name your own again; you came up clean
beats.win_costly: second person; {WIN_COSTLY} opens the way but its edge lays your arm as you pass; you come up onto the stage bleeding and shaking, but you come up, and the records come up with you
beats.win_quiet: second person; {WIN_QUIET} lets you out below the stalls where no one watches; you leave the labyrinth the way water leaves, unseen and unremarked, and no one ever knows you went down
beats.win_f0_c0: second person; you strike the dark last mirror to prove it hollow
beats.win_f0_c1: second person; the mirror was solid after all and it bursts inward across the threshold
beats.win_f0_end: second person; the glass keeps you one step short of the dawn; you were so near the top that no one below hears it happen
beats.win_f1_c0: second person; you hold at the threshold and wait for the house lights to come up and show the safe door plain
beats.win_f1_c1: second person; the delay is the last death of the labyrinth; the lights that come up are the keepers' lanterns, closing on the one who waited at the very door
beats.win_f1_end: second person; they take you on the last step with the dawn in sight; the way up closes over the records and over you
beats.win_seen: second person; you turn to your own reflection at the threshold to let it lead you up, the way it has mirrored you the whole climb; a reflection can only show the way back, or by some grace the way you already chose
beats.win_seen_c0: second person; the reflection points you back down the spine you climbed
beats.win_seen_c1: second person; you follow your own face away from the dawn and the labyrinth folds its mirrors shut behind you
beats.win_seen_end: second person; your reflection led you where reflections go, deeper in; the glass keeps the one who trusted it at the last
